specific_question: Out of all the sizes of Elexion's EV batteries, which is the most commonly used in our latest models?
answer: Of the latest models produced in 2024, the most common battery size used in Elexion's electric vehicles is 80 kWh.
dr_question: How can AI be used to help Elexion identify problems with their EVs before they become issues when EU's policy of zero emissions goes into effect in 2035?
